title.en: TECHNICAL SUBJECTS COVERED BY FORMER US CLASSIFICATION
Article holder attachable to apparel or body
Bale and package ties, hose clamps
Trouser guards, clips, straps [e.g., above shoetops]
Slit closing means including guides on opposite edges of slit and slidable bridging component
including readily dissociable fastener having numerous, protruding, unitary filaments randomly interlocking with, and simultaneously moving towards, mating structure [e.g., hook-loop type fastener]

Plural fasteners having intermediate flaccid connector
Drawstring, laced-fastener, or separate essential cooperating device therefor

Readily interlocking, two-part fastener requiring either destructive or tool disengagement

Bias [i.e. , helically] cutting of tubular stock
Shredding metal or metal wool article making
Foil or other thin sheet-metal making or treating
Means for forming clench-tongue [eg, for tieband]

toothed-cylinder making apparatus [e.g. , texture working cylinder]

By tool reciprocable along elongated edge
By endless band or chain knife
With means to guide moving work
Rotatable disc tool pair or tool and carrier

Two tool pairs, driver for one pair moves relative to driver for other pair
With illuminating or viewing means for work

Cutter assemblage or cutter element therefor [e.g., chain saw chain]
Single-crystal, oriented-crystal, and epitaxy growth processes; non-coating apparatus therefor

Control by change of position or inertia of system
Combustion failure responsive fuel safety cut-off for burners

Back flow prevention by vacuum breaking [e.g., anti-siphon devices]
Larner-Johnson type valves; i.e., telescoping internal valve in expanded flow line section
Inflatable article [e.g., tire filling chuck and/or stem]
With vehicle guide or support, e.g., service station
With cleaner, lubrication added to fluid or liquid sealing at valve interface
With liquid valves or liquid trap seals
Plural tanks or compartments with parallel flow
With holder for solid, flaky or pulverized material to be dissolved or entrained
With repair, tapping, assembly, or disassembly means
Non-valving motion of the valve or valve seat
With heating or cooling of the system
With fluid system support for workman or non-system material
With casing, support, protector or static constructional installations
Liquid level responsive or maintaining systems
Removable valve head and seat unit
With means for separating solid material from the fluid
With indicator, register, recorder, alarm or inspection means

Methods of surface bonding and/or assembly therefor
Methods of delaminating, per se; i.e. , separating at bonding face
Surface bonding means and/or assembly means with cutting, punching, piercing, severing or tearing

Surface bonding means and/or assembly means with bond interfering means [slip sheet, etc. ]

Severing by manually forcing against fixed edge
with measuring, indicating or control means
More than one set of gripping means
Jaws mounted on flexible member; i.e. , diaphragm
Selectively engageable hub to shaft connection
with adjunctive protector, broken parts retainer, repair, assembly or disassembly feature
Utilizing thermal characteristic, e.g. , expansion or contraction, etc.
Rotarily connected, differentially translatable members, e.g. , turn-buckle, etc.

Three or more serial joints, at least one diverse
Laterally related rods independently joined to transverse surface

Split end with laterally movable opposed portions

with product handling or receiving means

Hollow or container type article [e.g., tube, vase, etc.]
Layer or component removable to expose adhesive

Self-sustaining carbon mass or layer with impregnant or other layer
Surface property or characteristic of web, sheet or block
Composite [nonstructural laminate] of inorganic material having metal-compound-containing layer and having defined magnetic layer
Impregnated naturally solid product [e.g., leather, stone, etc.]
Composition for standardization, calibration, simulation, stabilization, preparation or preservation; processes of use in preparation for chemical testing
Heterocyclic carbon compound [i.e. , O, S, N, Se, Te, as only ring hetero atom]
Inorganic acid or base [e.g. , hcl, sulfuric acid, etc. ]
Nuclear magnetic resonance, electron spin resonance or other spin effects or mass spectrometry
Fabric [woven, knitted, or nonwoven textile or cloth, etc.]
Scrim [e.g., open net or mesh, gauze, loose or open weave or knit, etc.]

Coated or impregnated woven, knit, or nonwoven fabric which is not [a] associated with another preformed layer or fiber layer or, [b] with respect to woven and knit, characterized, respectively, by a particular or differential weave or knit, wherein the coating or impregnation is neither a foamed material nor a free metal or alloy layer
Woven fabric [i.e., woven strand or strip material]
Knit fabric [i.e., knit strand or strip material]
Nonwoven fabric [i.e., nonwoven strand or fiber material]

with control means energized in response to activator stimulated by condition sensor
with means to condition or adjust tool or tool support
